purpose: Keep raw model-native generation, constrained sampling, repair, and reranking structurally separated in Q2 artifacts and claims.

raw_flow.description: Unconstrained geometry-flow rollout emitted directly from the learned velocity field.

constrained_flow.description: Flow rollout after hard pocket-envelope or analogous geometric correction.

raw_rollout.description: Legacy native generation layer used by existing artifacts; Q2 flow artifacts should prefer raw_flow when available.

repaired.description: Candidate after repair. Must not be used as raw model-native evidence.

deterministic_proxy.description: Deterministic proxy-selected candidate; not backend docking evidence by itself.

reranked.description: Candidate selected by reranking. Must not mask weak raw_flow output.

forbidden_claim_patterns: Using repaired, inferred_bond, deterministic_proxy, or reranked values as raw model-native evidence.
Merging raw_flow and constrained_flow into a single summary row.
Reporting score_only backend values as experimental binding affinity.
Dropping coordinate_frame_origin or source pocket provenance from candidate rows.
